query:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS event_order_items;

CREATE TABLE event_order_items (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  eventOrderId INT NOT NULL,
  itemType ENUM('beverage', 'food', 'staff', 'delivery', 'equipment', 'other') NOT NULL,
  productId INT NULL,
  subcategoryId INT NULL,
  size VARCHAR(10) NULL,
  withBoba BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  itemName VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT NULL,
  customization TEXT NULL,
  quantity INT NOT NULL,
  unitPrice INT NOT NULL,
  totalPrice INT NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
